whatThisLessonMustPrepareStudentsToDo: Provide, complete, describe, list, apply, respond in completed assignment booklet responses format for ALBERTA DISTANCE LEARNING CENTRE SSN2171 Personal Psychology 20 KEY.
checksForUnderstanding: Quick retrieval: define and use Group, Influences, Roles in one accurate sentence.
Mini-explanation: explain Group without reading notes.
Error check: identify a common misconception about Group and correct it.
guidedPracticeIdeas: Model how to provide using the lesson vocabulary and one cited source example.
Walk through one assignment-booklet prompt from ALBERTA DISTANCE LEARNING CENTRE SSN2171 Personal Psychology 20 KEY and annotate what a successful response has to include.
Have students rehearse a response frame before they write independently.
independentPracticeIdeas: Complete a short practice task in the same assignment-booklet style used by ALBERTA DISTANCE LEARNING CENTRE SSN2171 Personal Psychology 20 KEY.
Use the required vocabulary list without copying a textbook paragraph.
Revise the response using the lesson's misconception and readiness checks.
evidenceOfReadinessForAssessment: Student can provide Group accurately without reverting to chapter-note summary.
Student uses Group, Influences, Roles in context.
Student completes a practice response that matches the success criteria language from ALBERTA DISTANCE LEARNING CENTRE SSN2171 Personal Psychology 20 KEY.
